landing.subtitle: HTML Structure Training
landing.description: Don't memorize tags — learn to see structure. Solve short problems and internalize HTML document structure.
landing.featureTargetDesc: Write code to match the target DOM structure. Watch the tree update in real time.
landing.featureFeedbackDesc: Invalid nesting triggers immediate warnings with clear structural error explanations.
landing.featureStructureDesc: No CSS, no rendered output. Focus purely on document structure.
landing.footer: TagQuest — The fastest way to master HTML structure

tracks.title: Learning Tracks
tracks.description: Each track can be taken independently. Start with whichever interests you.

level.emptyEditor: Write code to see the DOM tree

feedback.correctWithHint: You'll get it without a hint next time!
feedback.wrongStructure: The structure is a bit off. Check the target structure again.
feedback.forbiddenTag: The <{tag}> tag is not allowed in this problem.

validation.ulChild: <{child}> cannot be a child of <ul>. Only <li> is allowed inside <ul>.
validation.olChild: <{child}> cannot be a child of <ol>. Only <li> is allowed inside <ol>.
validation.tableChild: <{child}> cannot be a direct child of <table>.
validation.selectChild: <{child}> cannot be inside <select>. Only <option> is allowed.
validation.dlChild: <{child}> cannot be inside <dl>. Only <dt> and <dd> are allowed.
validation.liParent: <li> must be a direct child of <ul>, <ol>, or <menu>.
validation.imgAlt: is missing the "{attr}" attribute. Add it for accessibility.
validation.aHref: <a> without "{attr}" cannot function as a link.
validation.singleton: Only one <{tag}> element is allowed per page.
